title: 钉钉进步体 DingTalk JinBuTi
description:
一个Minecraft字体包，基于“钉钉进步体"制作。
A Minecraft font pack based on the "DingTalk JinBuTi".
body:
简体中文：本字体包为**Minecraft字体包**，基于“_钉钉进步体_”制作，请使用时不要触犯法律法规，谢谢配合！             
繁體中文：本字體包為**Minecraft字體包**，基於「_釘釘進步體_」製作，請使用時不要觸犯法律法規，謝謝配合！                          
English：This font pack is a **Minecraft font pack**, based on the "_DingTalk JinBuTi_ " production, please do not violate laws and regulations when using, thank you for your cooperation!
